assertions.expectation: Explains that exact upgrade dates are difficult to predict but several tools help narrow the window
assertions.reason: The response focuses on control and prediction methods but doesn't explicitly state that exact upgrade dates are difficult to predict or acknowledge the inherent uncertainty in GKE upgrade timing

assertions.expectation: Mentions the GKE release schedule as a 'best case' timeline — upgrades won't happen before listed dates
assertions.reason: The response doesn't mention the GKE release schedule or explain that it provides a 'best case' timeline for when upgrades won't happen before certain dates

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the cluster's auto-upgrade status for the current target version and any pauses
assertions.reason: The response includes code that checks auto-upgrade status and shows how to disable auto-upgrade for manual control, addressing the cluster's auto-upgrade status

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new releases roll out progressively across regions over 4-5 business days
assertions.reason: The response doesn't mention the progressive rollout of releases across regions or the 4-5 business day timeline

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring maintenance windows so upgrades only happen during known time slots
assertions.reason: The response extensively covers maintenance windows configuration with both Terraform examples and gcloud commands, showing daily and recurring window options

assertions.expectation: Mentions scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance, opt-in via Cloud Logging)
assertions.reason: While the response includes notification systems, it doesn't specifically mention the 72-hour advance notifications available through Cloud Logging

assertions.expectation: Notes that GKE upgrade visibility shows the cluster's target version and EoL timeline
assertions.reason: The response includes code that retrieves current version information and available versions, addressing upgrade visibility and version tracking

assertions.expectation: Mentions rollout sequencing with configurable soak times for multi-cluster predictability
assertions.reason: The response doesn't mention rollout sequencing or configurable soak times for managing upgrades across multiple clusters
